title: Al-Madina al-Fadila: The Virtuous City
description: Al-Farabi's political philosophy: the ideal city modeled on Plato's Republic, ruled by a philosopher-prophet.
introduction: Al-Farabi's political philosophy: the ideal city modeled on Plato's Republic, ruled by a philosopher-prophet.

translation.text: The virtuous city is one in which people cooperate to attain true happiness. Its ruler must be a philosopher.
